---
title: "Decision Log"
subtitle: "CHW Interventions for Maternal Mental Health in LMICs"
date: "2026-03-12"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    self-contained: true
  docx:
    toc: true
---

# Decision Log

This document records all major research decisions for audit trail purposes.
All decisions were made by the human researcher; the AI assistant recorded them.

| # | Date | Decision | Rationale | Made By | Context |
|---|------|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| 1 | 2026-03-01 | Adopt PRISMA 2020 as reporting standard | Standard systematic review with meta-analysis; PRISMA 2020 is the current guideline | Demo Researcher | Protocol development |
| 2 | 2026-03-01 | Use PICO framework for research question | Intervention effectiveness question; PICO is most appropriate framework | Demo Researcher | Protocol development |
| 3 | 2026-03-01 | Limit to English-language publications | Practical constraint; noted as limitation | Demo Researcher | Protocol development |
| 4 | 2026-03-02 | Search 5 databases via MCP servers | PubMed, OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, Europe PMC, CrossRef provide comprehensive free-tier coverage | Demo Researcher | Search strategy |
| 5 | 2026-03-02 | Date range: January 2005 – March 2026 | Task-shifting evidence in LMICs is largely post-2005; earlier literature is minimal | Demo Researcher | Search strategy |
| 6 | 2026-03-03 | Add "task-shifting" as search synonym | Key concept in LMIC mental health literature; initially omitted from search terms | Demo Researcher | Search strategy refinement |
| 7 | 2026-03-04 | 20% double-screening for title/abstract | Balance between rigor and single-reviewer constraints; exceeds minimum threshold | Demo Researcher | Screening process |
| 8 | 2026-03-05 | Include quasi-experimental studies | Two well-designed quasi-experimental studies met all other criteria; expands evidence base. Noted in limitations | Demo Researcher | Full-text screening |
| 9 | 2026-03-05 | Exclude 5 duplicate publications | Same patient cohorts reported in multiple papers; retained primary publication only | Demo Researcher | Full-text screening |
| 10 | 2026-03-07 | Random-effects model with REML estimator | Expected heterogeneity across diverse LMICs, intervention types, and populations makes fixed-effects inappropriate | Demo Researcher | Analysis planning |
| 11 | 2026-03-07 | Hedges' g (SMD) as effect measure | Studies used different depression instruments (EPDS, PHQ-9, BDI); standardization required | Demo Researcher | Analysis planning |
| 12 | 2026-03-07 | Subgroup by intervention type and delivery format | Pre-specified in protocol; most policy-relevant moderators. CBT vs. IPT vs. psychoeducation. Individual vs. group | Demo Researcher | Analysis planning |

---

*Decision log maintained with AI assistance (`@project-manager` agent). All decisions and rationales were provided by the research team.*
